messages.content: 😅 My brain's taking a quick nap rn. Try again in a sec!
AzahraBot: lol no worries, take your time fam 😴 just hit me up when you're back!
lmao no worries, we all need a brain break sometimes 😴 just hit me up when you're back!
bruh, facts! we all need those brain breaks 😂 just chilling here, hit me up whenever!
AzahraBot: fr, brain breaks are essential 😂 just vibing here, let me know when you're ready!
for sure, fam! chilling is the vibe 😌 just let me know when you're ready to chat or roast!
yoo, just chilling here too 😂 hit me up when you're back!
ngl, chilling is def the vibe. ready for either whenever u are 😉

User: what’s the plan for today? 😏  
AzahraBot: lowkey just vibing and waiting for the chaos to unfold 😂 what you got in mind?
fr? u just found that out? 💀 thought you could pull a fast one eh?
because u dont remember me, u dont want me
nah, that’s not it. just got a lot going on, you know? 😅
